tasks.title: F1: zero allowed-failure list -- KB test isolation + TZ-independent time tests
tasks.notes: Graph-neighbor block spies process.cwd() to empty temp dir so cold-seed cannot read the real .fleet/kb-canonical.json (root cause KB c5a129ed). time-utils: forced Asia/Tokyo via vi.stubEnv for the 2 sub-hour-sensitive assertions. Isolation proven (renamed real bible away, 39/39 pass). No literal allowlist existed in config; it was the 6 known-flaky tests, now green. Full suite 1995 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail.

tasks.title: F3: relocate general clamp into provider.capture choke point
tasks.notes: R3 DUPLICATE: enforcement clamp added in SqliteProvider.capture() after the directive gate; handler clamp kept for confidence_clamped UX flag. Seam commented for T2.1 import mode (internal 2nd param, unreachable from 1-arg HTTP route). Fail-then-pass provider test in kb-capture-gate.test.ts (red 'expected CONFIRMED to be INFERRED' pre-change). R5 fallout migrated to capture-then-promote in kb-decay/kb-promote/kb-feedback/kb-claims-proof/kb-token-and-learning. 1998 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail.

tasks.title: F2: bidirectional staleness -- hardened predicate + freshnessSweep
tasks.notes: Shared freshnessRevivable() predicate (4 non-hash conjuncts) + basisFullyMatches() + parseBasis(), reused by checkFreshness (now bidirectional) and freshnessSweep(). Marker anchored to FEEDBACK_MARKER_RE=/\n\n\[feedback \d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}T/. freshnessSweep returns {checked,staled,unstaled}; checked excludes empty/malformed basis. MCP tool kb_freshness_sweep registered. 8 test groups (core red 'freshnessSweep is not a function' pre-change; superseded/feedback/marker/invalidated/partial exclusions; empty-basis; shape). KB capture 5edfa184. 2006 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 1 (zero failures)
tasks.notes: npm run build clean (tsc). npm test 2006 passed / 14 skipped / 0 failed -- allowed-failure list gone. npx gitnexus analyze OK (4433 nodes/12174 edges, 41s); git checkout -- AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md run immediately after (no tracked doc drift). Pushed feat/code-intelligence-abstraction. STOP after T1.4 per dispatch.

tasks.title: F4: kb_import -- trusted channel, directive quarantine, source normalization, idempotency
tasks.notes: New src/tools/kb-import.ts + provider support. CaptureSource gains 'import'. capture() gets a 2nd param CaptureOpts {importMode,preferredId} (SqliteProvider only -- HTTP does capture(JSON.parse(body)) one-arg, MCP handler builds input from zod, so unreachable: R4 airtight). Order in capture(): directive gate -> provenance normalization (MEDIUM-4: !importMode && source in {import,promotion} -> 'unknown') -> clamp (gated on !importMode for non-directive). New public hasEntry(id) for LOW-2 id-skip FIRST (checks ALL rows, no use_count bump). preferredId used only on pure 'add'; AUDN update/flagged always mint fresh uuid. kb-import: resolveRepoPath (explicit>cwd>throw, mirrors kb-export), validates bible parses to array, per-entry: skip malformed, id-skip, capture(importMode+preferredId), then freshnessSweep. LOW-1 sweep anchoring: chdir to resolved repo for sweep, restore in finally (documented; absolute basis paths cwd-independent). Deterministic content synth from summary. Report {imported,skipped,superseded,flagged,sweep:{checked,staled,unstaled}}. kb_import registered in index.ts with trust-boundary description. 10 test groups all green incl R4 unreachability (test 7 forged import+promotion both clamped+source-scrubbed), directive-quarantine (test 2 UNVERIFIED+flagged+directive:pending, not in default retrieval), idempotency (test 3 symbol-less/file-less proves id-skip carries it). Full suite 2016 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail. NOTE (deviation): post-import sweep stales PRE-EXISTING wrong-branch entries whose files the merge changed, not freshly-imported ones -- capture recomputes basis=current so a fresh import with an existing file is fresh by construction (bible carries no hashes to preserve); test 6 documents + proves this.

tasks.title: F4 CLI: apra-fleet kb import wiring
tasks.notes: New src/cli/kb-import.ts (parseKbImportArgs, kbImportCmd(importFn,args), runKbImport) mirroring kb-commit.ts; thin wrapper over the same kbImport tool (no logic dup). Wired subCmd==='import' into src/index.ts kb argv dispatch. Prints 'Imported N, skipped..' + 'Freshness sweep: checked..' in plain ASCII; exit 1 on resolution failure. KB_IMPORT_USAGE + --path help carry the caller-asserted-trust line (LOW-1). 10 handler+smoke tests (parse, usage trust line, success/error exit codes, malformed JSON, real kbImport happy+missing-bible). End-to-end smoke: node dist/index.js kb import --repo <tmp> exits 1 'bible file not found' before touching the KB. Build clean; CLI tests green.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 2
tasks.notes: npm run build clean (tsc). npm test 2026 passed / 14 skipped / 0 failed -- zero-failure criterion holds. npx gitnexus analyze OK (4470 nodes/12271 edges, 41.2s); git checkout -- AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md run immediately after (no tracked doc drift). Pushed feat/code-intelligence-abstraction. STOP after T2.3 per dispatch.

tasks.title: D4: flaggedPairs + resolveContradiction + kb_reconcile_prefilter
tasks.notes: flaggedPairs(): joins challenger.contradiction_of = original.id, filters ONLY superseded_at IS NULL both sides (liveness -- stale members included), excludes pairs where either side is an ACTIVE user-directive (AUDN's contradiction check runs BEFORE the active-directive guard in audn.ts, so a directive CAN be flagged). resolveContradiction(winnerId, loserId, evidence): R7 single write path; LINKAGE REFUSAL throws (writes nothing) unless both rows exist, neither superseded, ids form a genuine pair (loser.contradiction_of===winnerId OR winner.contradiction_of===loserId), neither side an active directive. Winner path explicit order: (1) confidence=CONFIRMED + evidence note, (2) clear flagged_for_review + contradiction_of FIRST, (3) THEN evaluate shared freshnessRevivable + basisFullyMatches and clear stale only if both hold -- durable [feedback marker/invalidated exclusions survive the flag-clear. Loser: superseded_at=now + stale=1 + flag cleared, never deleted. reconcilePrefilter(): re-hashes both sides of every flaggedPairs() pair against current worktree (one batched computeFileHashBatch); exactly-one-match resolves via resolveContradiction('hash-basis match on merged worktree'); both/neither/empty-basis left_for_agent; belt-and-suspenders directive re-check feeds skipped_directive (flaggedPairs already excludes these, so it is 0 in practice). Registered kb_resolve_contradiction + kb_reconcile_prefilter MCP tools in src/index.ts. DEVIATION-FOLD (Phase 2 review MEDIUM yashr-d8b): computeFileHashBatch (file-hash.ts) gained optional {cwd} anchor threaded into freshnessSweep(root?) -- kb-import.ts's sweepAnchored() helper (which wrapped the sweep in process.chdir(repoAnchor)/process.chdir(prevCwd) across an await) is deleted; kbImport() now calls provider.freshnessSweep(repoAnchor) directly with zero process.chdir calls. Behavior identical (regression test spies process.chdir, asserts never called). 20 new tests (tests/knowledge/kb-reconcile.test.ts x19 + 1 chdir-spy test in kb-import.test.ts): flaggedPairs liveness (stale-included/superseded-excluded/lone-downvote-never-returned/directive-excluded), R7 linkage refusal (unlinked/missing-id/linked-but-superseded/active-directive), winner ordering (downvoted-stays-stale, invalidated-stays-stale, old-side-flagged-winner ends CONFIRMED+stale=0+passes list({confidence:CONFIRMED})), reconcilePrefilter (HIGH-1 win-path end-state incl. stale-member revival, both-match/both-mismatch/empty-basis left alone, directive pair untouched), tool wrapper round-trip + refusal propagation + report shape. Full suite 2046 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail; build clean.

tasks.title: D5: reconciler template + kb-reconcile.md + SKILL.md command
tasks.notes: New skills/pm/tpl-kb-reconciler.md (role template, model tier claude-sonnet-4-6): per remaining flagged pair, reads MERGED code via code_context/code_impact/code_query (never Glob/Grep), decides via the code; still-decides-nothing falls back to trust tier CONFIRMED>INFERRED>UNVERIFIED; still undecidable leaves flagged + a kb_feedback note for /pm kb-review. States the single-write-path rule (kb_resolve_contradiction only -- never kb_promote+kb_feedback composed), the active-directive-never-auto-retired rule, and the downvoted-winner-stays-stale rule explicitly ("do not fix it") so the agent does not undo D4's correct behavior. Report {pairs, code_decided, tier_decided, deferred}. New skills/pm/kb-reconcile.md (PM flow doc): 5-step ladder in exact tool-name order (kb_import -> kb_freshness_sweep -> kb_reconcile_prefilter -> reconciler agent -> kb_export), LOW-1 trust-boundary paragraph (repo-resolved bible = trusted channel, explicit --path = caller-asserted trust equivalent to kb_promote, directives quarantined either way), note that no post-prefilter sweep is needed (resolveContradiction sets the winner's final stale state itself). SKILL.md: command table row for /pm kb-reconcile, Lifecycle diagram line 'after merging branches: /pm kb-reconcile', cleanup command bullet extended with the post-merge hook sentence, new kb-reconcile bullet under Commands, both new files added to Sub-documents list. All files ASCII-verified byte-by-byte (no hook reliance). Docs-only task; build clean, full suite still run: 2046 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail (unchanged from T3.1 -- no test-affecting code).

tasks.title: F6: two-branch e2e proof
tasks.notes: New tests/knowledge/kb-reconcile-e2e.test.ts: real temp git repo (git init) + temp in-memory KB, following kb-export-autocommit.test.ts's real-repo pattern. Seeds branch-A entries (dup/refine/contra/undecided) with real hash bases against fixture files; writes a branch-B bible fixture (duplicate + refinement + 2 contradictions + a directive); kb_import; asserts duplicate skipped (AUDN none, content-equal to synthesizeContent=summary), refinement superseded (AUDN update, fresh random id -- bible id never reused on update/flagged branches per LOW-2, verified via a challengerIdFor() contradiction_of lookup rather than assuming the bible id), 2 contradictions flagged (pair asymmetry: original flagged_for_review=1, challenger UNVERIFIED+contradiction_of, forced regardless of bible CONFIRMED), directive pending (UNVERIFIED+flagged+directive:pending, absent from default query). DEVIATION-FOLD (Phase 2 reviewer guidance, honored not deviated): changed the branch-A file (fileGammaOld) for the FIRST contradiction pair AFTER import, before the sweep -- proves the sweep retires a PRE-EXISTING wrong-branch entry (aContra stales) while the freshly-imported challenger (fileGammaNew, untouched) stays fresh by construction; explicitly asserted NOT stale rather than asserting the sweep stales the fresh import. flaggedPairs() liveness re-verified at e2e level (pair still returned despite aContra stale). kb_reconcile_prefilter resolves pair 1 (challenger wins on hash match) to CONFIRMED+stale=0+passes list({confidence:CONFIRMED}); loser superseded+stale=1+flag cleared; pair 2 (both sides empty basis -- hash-undecidable) counted in left_for_agent, rows untouched. kb_export's canonical bible contains the winner, excludes the superseded loser and the pending directive. Full suite 2047 pass / 14 skip / 0 fail; build clean.
